content: react-dropzone v15 useDropzone hook: accepts options object with maxFiles (number, 0=unlimited), maxSize (bytes), accept (MIME type map like {image/jpeg:[], image/png:[]}), multiple (boolean), onDrop callback receiving (acceptedFiles, fileRejections, event). Returns {getRootProps, getInputProps, isDragActive, isDragAccept, isDragReject, acceptedFiles, fileRejections, open}. Each rejected file has {file, errors} with error.code and error.message. For thumbnail previews: use URL.createObjectURL(file) in the onDrop callback, store in state, revoke on unmount via useEffect cleanup. Use Object.assign(file, {preview: URL.createObjectURL(file)}) to attach preview URLs to file objects. The open() function can trigger the file dialog programmatically.
